title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Red Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Red Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Red Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Red Express:
Red Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Red Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
